goal: Sync and log intents from all remote actor logs

summary.title: Sync all actor logs
summary.what: Updated sync to fetch actor logs into remote-tracking refs and rebuild the mainline view from every local and origin actor log instead of only the current actor.
summary.why: Developers could not see sealed intents from other actors after sync because event collection only read the local actor identity ref.
summary.user_goal: Fix mainline sync so other developers can see my proposed intent through the standard workflow.

decisions.rationale: Remote actor logs should be tracked separately from local actor log refs.

decisions.chose: Read both refs/heads and refs/remotes/origin actor log prefixes
decisions.rationale: The materialized view should be derived from all known actor logs, not only the current identity.

decisions.chose: Add reading actor events by concrete ref while keeping the actor-id helper
decisions.rationale: Sync needs remote-tracking refs whose names are not local actor ids.

rejected.alternative: Keep reading only the local actor log
rejected.reason: That prevents team-wide visibility after sync.

risks: Duplicate local and remote copies of the same actor event need deduplication during view rebuild.
followups: Expose sync diagnostics for how many actor refs and events were read.

architectural_claims: Mainline view rebuild must aggregate all known actor logs from local and remote-tracking refs.
behavioral_changes: mainline sync fetches actor logs into refs/remotes/origin/_mainline/actor/*.
mainline log shows proposed intents from other actors after sync.
Duplicate event payloads from local and remote refs are ignored during collection.
